name: ATIF Holdings Limited
summary: ATIF Holdings Limited, a consulting company, provides financial consulting services to small and medium-sized enterprises in Asia. It offers going public consulting services, and event execution and planning services. The company was formerly known as Asia Times Holdings Limited and changed its name to ATIF Holdings Limited in March 2019. ATIF Holdings Limited was incorporated in 2015 and is headquartered in Rancho Cucamonga, California.
